mnemonics: ELMASRI & NAVATHE: Every Logical Model Aids Students' Reasoning & Navigation. Now, All Valuable Theories Help Engineers.
Remember the Authors: Ramez ElMasri (like El-Master) and Shamkant B. Navathe (Navigator of Data).
keyPoints: Elmasri and Navathe are the authors of the highly influential textbook 'Fundamentals of Database Systems'.
Their work is a cornerstone in Database Management System (DBMS) education, covering concepts from the relational model to physical storage.
The textbook's structure, progressing from conceptual to internal levels, is a model for many DBMS courses.
commonMistakes: Mispronouncing or misspelling their names (e.g., 'Elmarsi', 'Navath', 'Shamkant' as one word).
Attributing specific DBMS theories or models (like the Relational Model by Codd) directly to them instead of recognizing their role as comprehensive educators and textbook authors.
